title: Case Management - Generic
content:
This playbook executes when no other playbook is associated with an incident. It enriches indicators in an incident using one or more integrations.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR Customer Success pack (CaseManagement-Generic, community-supported).

Use cases: Case Management.
